summary: Login fix, Help page rewrite, L2 fixes, auto-cancel toggle.
release_notes: Fixed login — the email OTP sign-in screen now appears correctly on startup.
Level 2 depth rows now show the normal background color by default instead of black.
Custom L2 colors you've set in Settings are preserved and unaffected.
Fixed stale ask prices lingering in the L2 book — depth data is now sorted, capped, and cross-filtered.
Help page rewritten for clarity — simplified login section, removed technical jargon.
Added documentation for Reverse Split ($), SHELF S-3, and News Dot badges.
New Help sections: News, Company Info, and Auto-Update.
Settings tab list now includes Release Notes.
Fixed site URL to blitztrade.io throughout.
New 'Auto-cancel orders on close' toggle in Settings → Trading and on Close 50%/100% gear menus.
When disabled, Close 50% and Close 100% place the closing order without canceling existing orders for the ticker.
